scripts.db:migrate: cd apps/backend && uv run alembic upgrade head
scripts.db:migrate:down: cd apps/backend && uv run alembic downgrade -1
scripts.db:migrate:create: cd apps/backend && uv run alembic revision --autogenerate -m
scripts.db:migrate:history: cd apps/backend && uv run alembic history
scripts.db:migrate:current: cd apps/backend && uv run alembic current
